entity.summary: Australian-founded Bitcoin exchange established in 2013. By 2015-2016, customers reported prolonged withdrawal failures and unpaid balances, while the owner acknowledged difficulty paying customers back; HEI retains inactive status because the reviewed evidence does not establish a definitive shutdown announcement or terminal operating date.
entity.notes: The existing launch and April 2016 withdrawal-failure events are not duplicated. Contemporary reporting strongly supports severe operational distress, customer non-payment, and collapse risk, but not a clean legally or operationally verified terminal date. Keep inactive rather than forcing dead or scam classification.

expected.summary: Australian-founded Bitcoin exchange founded in 2013. By April 2016, major Australian reporting described Igot as on the verge of collapse, with customers claiming unpaid balances and the owner acknowledging difficulty paying customers back. HEI models it as inactive rather than dead because the current evidence set does not establish a definitive shutdown announcement or terminal date.
expected.notes: HEI models Igot as inactive rather than dead because contemporary reporting strongly supports severe operational distress and non-payment complaints, but does not provide a clean official shutdown announcement or terminal operating date. Do not mark as dead without stronger terminal evidence.

changes.notes: The existing launch and April 2016 withdrawal-failure events are not duplicated. Contemporary reporting strongly supports severe operational distress, customer non-payment, and collapse risk, but not a clean legally or operationally verified terminal date. Keep inactive rather than forcing dead or scam classification.

evidence.title: Igot: Bitcoin investors owed thousands of dollars by struggling Australian exchange
evidence.notes: Major Australian reporting documenting unpaid customers, prolonged withdrawal failures, and the owner's acknowledgement of repayment difficulty.

evidence.title: Bitcoin Exchange Igot Is On The Verge Of Collapse
evidence.notes: Secondary confirmation of severe operational and refund problems without a definitive terminal date.
